## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance is steady, with Google traffic at an all-time high, but the team aims to outpace competitors (especially Arise) in H2](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Model Hub pages are a priority; design wireframes needed ASAP to proceed with content creation](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [New topic clusters and evergreen content (Model Hub, Framework Hub) expected to boost growth](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Team exploring new content distribution channels (e.g., Reddit) to improve LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Traffic steady at \~1,500 visits, with Google traffic at an all-time high](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Perplexity referrals decreased slightly](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Galileo keeping pace with Arise in keyword rankings and traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [July showing typical seasonal downturn; team monitoring to confirm if trend continues](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [RAC cluster saw biggest weekly jump; Agents cluster experienced some position loss (under investigation)](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Arise and Langchain ahead in overall website keyword rankings (positions 1-10)](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Galileo blog subdomain outperforming Promptful and Braintrust](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Focus on outpacing Arise's growth rate across all metrics in H2](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [New topic clusters proposed to fill content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Model Hub and Framework Hub pages identified as high-potential evergreen content](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Design wireframes for Model Hub pages needed to kickstart content creation](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Team to review problem list shared by Conor for potential content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

### LLM Referrals and Branded Search

  - [LLM referrals decreased slightly, mainly due to ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Branded searches showing positive correlation with LLM traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Team tracking prompts in Scrunch; open to adjustments if needed](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### New Content Distribution Tactics

  - [Exploring Reddit as a platform for listicle-style content to improve LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Potential "loophole" identified: posting from company account rather than in subreddits](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [Team to investigate and potentially implement this tactic, acknowledging its possible short-term effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule meeting with Jeff (designer) to discuss Model Hub page wireframes (set for 8 AM Pacific tomorrow)](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Jackson to review GeoPrompts in detail and provide feedback on pain points, features, and differentiators](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review shared problem list folder for potential content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [Investigate and potentially implement Reddit content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance, with a focus on outpacing Arise's growth rate](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Vivek to send detailed branded search report to Conor](https://fathom.video/share/c-eYdZxzX2etKTR5PaM7GY-vA25nwy3M?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
